actions.action: Check if any story is available in memory for which all the dialogue statuses are success, and present the dialogues from the selected story with a 10-second interval until the story is completed. Once that story is done, proceed to give the next story using the same process.
actions.fallback_action: If fails then give some joke to use and ask to try later.

recipe.steps: Retrieve the user ID from memory.
Fetch the stories and their statuses for the retrieved user ID.
If stories are found, present dialogues from the selected story with a 10-second interval until the story is completed. Once one story is done, proceed to the next available story in the same manner.
If no stories are found, provide a joke to the user and ask them to try again later.
